title: alnus mairei
intro: Alnus mairei, also known as Korean alder, is a species of deciduous tree native to East Asia, characterized by its conical shape and greyish-brown bark. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been utilized to treat various health conditions. Alnus mairei is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
